pullRequest.title: DOM-55178 updating compatibility matrix for new MLFlow version

nodes.body:
Tldr for my OpenAI testing: [This doc](https://platform.openai.com/docs/models/model-endpoint-compatibility) describes correct compatibility. Completions and Chat will work with any of the endpoints described in the /v1/chat/completions row, endpoints work according to the /v1/embeddings row. Since the user can also use specific dated model releases (ex: gpt-3.5-turbo-1106 vs gpt-3.5-turbo), I've decided to leave it open ended with no validation on model. Open to discussion/thoughts though


<br class="Apple-interchange-newline">
I agree. In fact, I think we should consider doing that for all providers as this can keep changing rapidly - we'll have to keep updating whenever there are changes on the mlflow/provider end.
